history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a close-up view of large black text on a white background reading multiple lines.  

Main Subject:
Text reading “admin”, “mana”, “link”, and “hentaiinyaa” arranged in separate lines, with “hentaiinyaa” appearing as a single word across the last line.

Setting:
Plain white background with no other visible objects, appearing like a text-only screenshot or graphic.

Visual Details:
The text is in a bold, sans-serif style, black in color, left-aligned, and cropped tightly so only the letters and line beginnings/endings are visible. The letters are large and occupy most of the frame, with ample white space around them.

Visible Text:
admin
mana
link
hentaiinyaa

Practical Summary:
The image displays large black text on a white background. It consists of four separate lines of words shown as a cropped text block.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

admin  
mana  
link  
hentainya  

# Structured Version

- admin  
- mana  
- link  
- hentainya  

# Notes

Text appears as separate lines; original spacing/formatting is unclear.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
